metadata.title: Photo to Anime AI Converter Online
metadata.description: Convert any photo to anime online with AI. Turn selfies and portraits into anime art with styles like Ghibli-inspired, cyberpunk, 90s retro, and webtoon.
metadata.keywords: photo to anime, photo to anime ai, photo to anime converter, anime filter, ai anime converter, ghibli filter ai, anime pfp generator

hero.title: Photo to Anime
hero.subtitle: Upload a photo and turn it into anime art online. Pick a style, adjust intensity, and generate a clean 2D anime look in seconds.
hero.tool_subtitle: Upload a photo to start. You’ll be asked to sign in to generate.

uploader.title: Upload Your Image
uploader.drop_zone: Drag & drop your image here, or click to browse
uploader.error_invalid: Invalid file type. Please upload an image.
uploader.error_size: File too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

anime_editor.panel_subtitle: Pick a style and tune the details.
anime_editor.prompt_placeholder: E.g., soft lighting, clean background, cute expression…
anime_editor.signin_gate_title: Sign in to generate your anime image.
anime_editor.signin_gate_desc: New accounts get a small free allowance. Upgrade anytime for more generations.
anime_editor.error_signin_required: Sign in required to generate. Create an account to get a free allowance.
anime_editor.disclaimer: Results vary by photo quality and chosen style.

home_static.f1_desc: Built for anime aesthetics—not generic cartoon filters.
home_static.f2_desc: Upload → choose style → adjust intensity → generate.
home_static.f3_desc: Great for PFPs, cosplay edits, and sharing.
home_static.styles_subtitle: Explore focused landing pages for specific anime filter looks.
home_static.use_subtitle: For avatars, cosplay redraws, and creative edits.
home_static.u1_desc: Generate a standout anime PFP for Discord/Twitch.
home_static.u2_desc: Turn cosplay photos into polished anime art.
home_static.u3_desc: Create consistent anime visuals for posts and projects.
home_static.faq1_q: Do I need to sign up?
home_static.faq1_a: Yes. Generation requires signing in. New accounts get a small free allowance.
home_static.faq2_a: Standard anime, Ghibli-inspired, cyberpunk, 90s retro, webtoon, and more.
home_static.faq3_q: Can I keep my hair/eye color?
home_static.faq3_a: Yes—enable the toggles to ask the model to preserve those colors.
home_static.faq4_q: Is it safe to upload photos?
home_static.faq4_a: Uploads are sent to a third-party AI service for generation. See our Privacy Policy for details.
home_static.cta_subtitle: Create an account and generate your first images.

landing.how_step1: Upload a clear photo (portraits work best).
landing.how_step2: Choose a style and adjust anime intensity.
landing.how_step3: Generate and download your anime image.

Pricing.title: Four cards. One obvious upgrade path.
Pricing.subtitle: Put buy-out packs and Pro subscriptions on the same plane, and the math starts selling for you. The lower the per-image cost and the richer the privileges, the easier the decision becomes.
Pricing.artist_anchor: Commissioning a human artist for a custom anime portrait can cost $30-$50 and take weeks. Animeify Pro gives you 100 studio-quality generations instantly for less than the price of one commission.
Pricing.refill_subtitle: Pick a quick buy-out pack or jump straight into Pro.
